name: Settings page loads with accessible tabs
description: The Settings page renders correctly with Profile, Preferences, Subjects, and Account tabs. Each tab loads its content without errors.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Settings link in the sidebar
Verify the Settings page loads and shows tab buttons: Profile, Preferences, Subjects, Account
Verify the Preferences tab content loads — showing the Study Preferences section with timezone and feature settings
Click the Home link in the sidebar to navigate away
Click the Settings link in the sidebar to return
Verify the Settings page reloads successfully — confirming the page state is stable across navigation
